programs.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programs.desc: The identity of Dylan's mysterious caller is revealed; Liam has a solution for Katie's designer problem.

programs.title: Beyond the Gates
programs.desc: Bill and Vernon lock horns over Martin; Ashley brings Naomi up to speed on Grayson's stabbing; Kat decides to question Lia about Lynette; Nicole and Leslie have an unpleasant reunion.

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.desc: After an online acquaintance spends thousands of dollars on a woman in a matter of days, she sues him for harassment; a motorist says a mysterious white car hit his head-on and caused him to back into six vehicles.

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.sub_title: Hockey Violence Victim; Float My Houseboat!
programs.desc: Fathers fight over liability after one child causes another's concussion; a man who sold a boat tries to explain the many reasons the title was not in his name.

programs.title: Hot Bench
programs.desc: What was meant to be a getaway becomes a full-blown fallout: one former friend claims violence and vandalism, while the other argues she was provoked, pushed and shut out; this vacation shows some trips end with baggage no one packed.

programs.title: Hot Bench
programs.desc: The plaintiff says she lent the defendant money with the promise of repayment from the defendant's cruise gambling winnings; the defendant insists that the plaintiff owes her for hair services and accuses her of defamation.
